name: Buttery Caramel Quicks
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F. Makes 12 rolls.
In a 9-inch square pan, melt the butter. Stir in the 1/3 cup brown sugar and water.
Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Add milk all at once, stirring just until dry ingredients are moistened. Turn out onto a well-floured surface. Roll out to a 12x10 inch rectangle. Combine the 1/3 cup brown sugar, cinnamon, and pecans. Sprinkle over dough. Roll up starting with the 12-inch side. Cut into 1-inch slices; place cut-side down in the prepared pan.
Bake at 425°F for 18 to 22 minutes until golden brown. Turn out immediately. Serve hot.
For use with Pillsbury's Best Self-Rising Flour, omit baking powder and salt.
HIGH ALTITUDE ADJUSTMENT - 5,200 FEET. Reduce baking powder to 1 1/2 teaspoons.
